# Lightfriend

> AI assistant for dumbphones, designed so no one else can see your chats or personal data, including while AI processes them. All code is open source, and cryptographic evidence lets anyone independently verify which code is running in production.

Lightfriend bridges the gap between minimalist dumbphones and essential digital services. Users interact entirely through SMS text messages and voice calls from any phone. It is a practical solution for people overcoming phone addiction: users keep access to essential communication without the addictive apps, infinite feeds, and attention-harvesting algorithms of smartphones.

## Verifiable Privacy Architecture

Lightfriend's privacy goal shapes the entire architecture: hardware isolation, encrypted storage, independent key management, remote attestation, and verifiable AI inference. The source code and cryptographic evidence about the production deployment are public.

The production application runs inside an AWS Nitro Enclave with no SSH login, interactive debugger, persistent storage, or direct external networking. AWS hardware signs an attestation document containing the enclave measurement. That reported measurement can be compared with the open-source build and the public approval registry. Marlin KMS evaluates attestation before releasing encryption keys, and the Lightfriend operator does not manually provision the master key.

Key properties:

- **Hardware isolation**: Production runs in an AWS Nitro Enclave with restricted interfaces to the parent server.
- **Remote attestation**: AWS hardware signs an attestation document containing PCR0/PCR1/PCR2 measurements.
- **Open source + reproducible builds**: Automated builds publish enclave measurements for comparison with the live attestation.
- **Public code registry**: Approved code measurements are published to an Arbitrum smart contract.
- **Independent key management**: Marlin KMS evaluates attestation before releasing encryption keys.
- **Verifiable AI inference**: Tinfoil publishes source code and attestation evidence for its confidential-computing inference environment.
- **Deployment verification**: Anyone can run `./scripts/verify_live_attestation.sh` to check the reported measurement against the public build and approval registry.
- **Live attestation endpoints**: `/.well-known/lightfriend/attestation` returns live PCR values, commit SHA, and build metadata.

The verification chain combines open-source code, reproducible builds, hardware-signed attestation, and a public code registry. It makes the reported deployment identity independently inspectable; it does not prove that the software is free of bugs.

For the full technical explanation, including key rotation and what still requires trust: [Privacy Architecture](https://lightfriend.ai/trustless)

For live verification data with timestamps, blockchain transactions, and attestation status: [Live Trust Chain](https://lightfriend.ai/trust-chain)

### Optional voice calls

Voice calls currently use OpenAI Realtime for a faster, more natural experience. Call audio and transcripts are processed outside Lightfriend's independently verifiable trust chain. OpenAI states that API data is not used for training unless the customer opts in, but default Realtime abuse-monitoring logs may retain customer content for up to 30 days. Voice calls are optional, and Lightfriend will switch as soon as a suitable open-source, attested voice alternative can provide a comparable experience.

## Phone Addiction Solution

Lightfriend is designed for people who want to break free from phone addiction. Smartphones combine essential tools (messaging, email, calendar) with addictive elements (social media feeds, push notifications, app stores). Lightfriend decouples these: users get the essential services via SMS and voice calls on a basic phone, without any of the addictive interfaces. Common use cases include:

- Switching to a dumbphone or Light Phone without losing access to WhatsApp, Telegram, Signal, or email
- Reducing screen time by eliminating the smartphone entirely
- Managing ADHD and attention issues by removing digital distractions
- Digital minimalism lifestyle with AI-powered critical notification filtering

## Docs

- [How It Works](https://lightfriend.ai/faq): FAQ covering features, setup, privacy, and compatible phones
- [Pricing](https://lightfriend.ai/pricing): Autopilot costs $80/month, $210 every 3 months, or $420/year with a 7-day free trial
- [Privacy Architecture](https://lightfriend.ai/trustless): Full explanation of the hardware isolation, attestation, and trust chain
- [Live Trust Chain](https://lightfriend.ai/trust-chain): Real-time verification of the running enclave
- [Supported Countries](https://lightfriend.ai/supported-countries): 40+ countries with local or notification-only numbers
- [Bring Your Own Number](https://lightfriend.ai/bring-own-number): Use your own Twilio number in unsupported countries

## Security Architecture

Lightfriend is read-only by default. The default tool policy allows analysis and SMS notifications while messaging and email actions pass through explicit approval checks in application code. Optional WHEN/IF/THEN automation rules are disabled by default and constrained to the actions they define. These controls are designed to limit the impact of prompt injection.

For the full explanation: [How Lightfriend Limits Prompt-Injection Impact](https://lightfriend.ai/prompt-injection-safe)

- [How Lightfriend Limits Prompt-Injection Impact](https://lightfriend.ai/prompt-injection-safe): Read-only-by-default architecture with application-code approval gates

- [Signal on Dumbphone](https://lightfriend.ai/signal-on-dumbphone): How to use Signal encrypted messaging on any basic phone via SMS
- [Light Phone 3 WhatsApp Guide](https://lightfriend.ai/light-phone-3-whatsapp-guide): Add WhatsApp to Light Phone 3 via Lightfriend

- [How to Read More Accidentally](https://lightfriend.ai/how-to-read-more-accidentally): How removing smartphone distractions leads to reading more
